layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for main sections.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento grids for categories. Mode A (Tetris) for marketing sections.
layout.surface_treatment: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)].

navigation.style: Crystal Glass sticky header. z-50. bg-[#05030A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D4AF37]/10.

hero.style: Full height or min-h-[80vh]. Background uses image overlaid with bg-gradient-to-b from-[#05030A]/60 to-[#05030A].
hero.alignment: Center aligned or optical asymmetric layout.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-none tracking-wide hover:bg-[#F1D570] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/50 rounded-none hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors duration-300

product_cards.style: Flat surface or slight glass. border border-[#D4AF37]/10. No heavy shadows. Hover: -translate-y-1, border-[#D4AF37]/30, shadow-[0_10px_40px_-10px_rgba(212,175,55,0.15)].
product_cards.image_container: bg-[#0C0714] aspect-square overflow-hidden. Image should scale slightly on card hover.

disclaimer_banner.style: Top-most fixed banner. bg-[#3B0955] text-[#F8F7FA] text-xs sm:text-sm text-center py-2 tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20.

animations.hover: Subtle scale up (scale-105) for images, smooth color transitions (duration-300 ease-out).
animations.scroll: Fade up and staggered entrance for product lists using framer-motion. y: 20 -> y: 0.

images.description: Abstract dark purple and gold motion blur for hero background.
Scientific laboratory tools and vials with metallic reflections.
Clear glass test tubes and vials for product stand-in.
Abstract purple scientific background with dots and lines.

icons.instruction: Use Phosphor Icons with Duotone weight for a high-end luxury feel. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark overlays. Primary buttons have black text on gold background for > 4.5:1 contrast.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all framer-motion animations.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='cart-icon').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion @stripe/stripe-js clsx tailwind-merge`.
Setup Tailwind config with custom colors: background, surface, primary (gold), secondary (purple).
Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts to index.html and tailwind.config.js.
Use Shadcn UI sparingly; for e-commerce product grids, build custom pure HTML/Tailwind components to ensure the 'Jewel & Luxury' dark aesthetic.
Create a prominent Top Banner for the 'Research purposes only, not for human consumption' disclaimer.
Implement guest checkout flow integrating Stripe Elements (Stripe payment integration). Include email and shipping address collection.
Ensure all components use the generous spacing scale (p-8, p-12).
Products should be organized by categories. Use the provided images as placeholders for peptides.
Do NOT use `Inter` for headings. Ensure headings use Cormorant Garamond.
Include a shopping cart drawer or page with a smooth animation.
Implement Email notifications logic stub or UI feedback for order confirmation.
